user.title: pvnode
user.description: Connect your pvnode account. Create an API key at https://pvnode.com.

site.title: pvnode Site
site.description: Enter the Site ID from your pvnode portal (https://pvnode.com/sites/new). Roof surfaces configured for this site are detected automatically - no further setup needed.

roof.title: Roof surface
roof.description: Configure a roof surface for pvnode API v1. Add one entry per roof surface / array.

general.title: Subscription & forecast
general.description: These settings control the poll interval and forecast horizon.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with pvnode
reauth_confirm.description: The pvnode API rejected the stored API key. Please enter a new one.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure pvnode
reconfigure.description: Update the API key (and Site-ID for API v2) without recreating this integration entry.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the pvnode API
error.already_configured: This Site-ID is already used by another pvnode entry

abort.already_configured: This pvnode account/site is already configured

abort.no_roofs: There are no roof surfaces to remove

auth_failed.message: pvnode rejected the stored API key. Please re-authenticate.

v1_shutdown.message: pvnode API v1 has been shut down. Please switch to API v2 (pvnode Site-ID) in the integration options.

no_roofs_configured.message: No roof surfaces configured for pvnode API v1. Add at least one in the integration options.

v1_deprecated.title: pvnode API v1 is deprecated
v1_deprecated.description:
This pvnode integration entry still uses the deprecated API v1, which pvnode will shut down on 2026-12-31. After that date, this integration will stop receiving data via API v1.

To continue receiving forecasts, create a Site at https://pvnode.com/sites/new, then remove this integration entry and add pvnode again, this time selecting API v2 with your new Site-ID.
